meaning: n.(纸牌或骰子)幺点,王牌飞行员(击落敌机五架以上者);adj.一流的;[军]Allied Command Europe,欧洲盟军司令部
examples: Our superior technology is our ace in the hole.
By now I was an ace at driving on the left.
He knows something about the boss, which is his ace in the hole.
Eddie Rickenbacker, the World War I ace, bravely founded Eastern Airlines in the late 1930s.
When Ace bought INA, Duperreault could have moved it to Bermuda to save on taxes.
